title: Day 20 Reflection
description: Solidify performance patterns before Week 3 machine coding tomorrow.

prompts.question: What did React DevTools Profiler show before vs after optimization?
Which component benefited most from React.memo and why?
Did useCallback fix a memo break? What was the unstable prop?
How much did lazy loading reduce initial bundle or load time?
prompts.guidance: Chunk names or build analyze output.

prompts.question: What would you rebuild differently under 150-minute pressure tomorrow?
